raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The proposed amendments to Rules 1111 and 1121 would phase out natural gas furnaces and water heaters in favor of all-electric units starting in 2026.",
    "The changes would apply to Los Angeles, Orange, Riverside, and San Bernardino Counties, potentially affecting millions.",
    "Retrofitting homes to switch to electric units could cost up to $47,000 for a single-family home and $40,100 for a multi-family rental unit.",
    "The added costs of retrofitting do not include the burden on electrical infrastructure, permits, or lost time.",
    "Future updates to the rule could eliminate the gas replacement option entirely, leaving electric conversion as the only path forward."
  ]
}
```
